case_title: CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. ARUTUN KECHEDJIAN

ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

CLAIM SET FOR JAN-09-2019 IS VACATED. THE COURT VACATES SUBMISSION OF THIS CASE. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE THE COURT AND THE CITY AND COUNTY WITH A REPORT, TO BE FILED ON MARCH 11, 2019 OF THE STATUS OF HIS INSURANCE CLAIM. DEFENDANT MUST SERVE THE REPORT BY MAIL ON THE CITY. THE CITY MAY RESPOND ON OR BEFORE APRIL 11, 2019 AND MUST SERVE ITS RESPONSE ON DEFENDANT. THE COURT DOES NOT ANTICIPATE A NEED FOR FURTHER APPEARANCES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ARUTUN KECHEDJIAN. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT CCSF /TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE. APPEARANCE IS NOT REQUIRED AT THIS HEARING. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-05-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH AND JUMA BRYD LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALISTS. DEFENDANT ARUTUN KECHEDJIAN IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE. THE CITY NOT PREPARED FOR TRIAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-09-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUMA BYRD, SENIOR COLLECTIONS AGENT. DEFENDANT ARUTUN KECHEDJIAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: VACATE SUBMISSION OF CLAIM. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
NOTICE OF UPDATED STATUS OF INSURANCE CLAIM .... FILED BY DEFENDANT KECHEDJIAN, ARUTUN
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-13-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLOETOR'S OFFICE IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ARUTUN KETCHEDJIAN. : DEFENDANT SOUGHT TO FILE ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTS WITH THE COURT ON MAY 29, 2019. THE COURT SETS THE FOLLOWING FINAL BRIEFING SCHEDULE: DEFENDANT MAY FILE ANY SUPPLEMENTAL MATERIALS WITH THE COURT BY JUNE 5, 2019 BUT MUST SERVE THE MATERIALS ON PLAINTIFF OR THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER THEM. THE CITY MAY FILE ANY RESPONSE BY JUNE 12, 2019 BUT MUST SERVE ITS FILING ON DEFENDANT OR THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER IT. THE MATTER WILL BE DEEMED SUBMITTED ON JUNE 12, 2009. THE COURT DOES NOT ANTICIPATE A NEED FOR A FURTHER HEARING JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FILED EVIDENCE THAT HIS INSURANCE CARRIER HAS PAID SFGH MORE THAN THE $5000 THAT THE CITY SEEKS FOR THE SFGH BILL IN THIS LAWSUIT. PLAINTIFF SOUGHT DISMISSAL ON THAT BASIS. THE CITY HAS FILED NO RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST AND EVIDENCE; ITS RESPONSE WAS ORDERED BY JUN-12-2019. THE COURT DISMISSES THE COMPLAINT WITH PREJUDICE IN VIEW OF THE CITY'S APPARENT ACQUIESCENCE IN PLAINTIFF'S DISMISSAL REQUEST.
NOTICE OF STATUS OF INSURANCE CLAIM & REQUEST TO CONTINUE ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT KECHEDJIAN, ARUTUN
ORDER GRANTING THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. UNOPPOSED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
NOTICE OF FILING SUPPLEMENTAL DOCUMENTS/ MATERIALS AS EVIVENCE TOWARD THIS CASE AND REQUEST OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. - FILED BY DEFENDANT KECHEDJIAN, ARUTUN
